subject: [PATCH 3/7 v2] mm/page_counter: introduce stock drain APIs

2026-05-22.patch_summary: This patch introduces two new functions, page_counter_drain_stock_local and page_counter_drain_stock_cpu, which are used to drain the stock of a page counter. The local function takes a lock to serialize against concurrent charges, while the CPU function does not take a lock because it is only called from the CPU hotplug path where the CPU is dead and cannot have any more charges. These functions replace the existing memcg stock draining functions.
